'''Clandes''' was a settlement on [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]]. It was an industrial [[City/Legends|city]], beneath which there was a communications landline junction. It was also surrounded by [[Mining/Legends|mines]]. It was located 300 [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] south of [[ChikatLik]] and 75 kilometers southeast of the [[Dashta Mountains]]. It was built over an old [[X'Ting]] hive.

Technically, it was not a city, but a 1000-square-kilometer complex of [[Clandes Industrial]] that stretched twenty-four levels underground. It accounted for sixty percent of Cestus' economy, including production of the [[JK-13 security droid|Jedi Killer droid]]s.
